description: Account Create & Edit Forms. (1) No account create form page — router has create procedure but no frontend consumer (F-16). Create page at accounts/(list)/new/page.tsx with form for all account fields. (2) No account edit form — Edit button navigates but lands on 404 (F-17). Create edit form page or inline edit mode using router update procedure. Both forms should validate with accountSchema. Audit: docs/audit/account-detail-wiring-audit.md section 10.

wiring_complete.target: Create and edit forms submit successfully; validation errors displayed

notes: Account domain wiring audit finding. See docs/audit/account-detail-wiring-audit.md.
